products.name: Premium Leather Bag
products.desc:
Handcrafted genuine leather bag — built to last a lifetime.

Features:
• Premium full-grain leather
• Spacious main compartment
• Inner zipper pocket
• Adjustable shoulder strap

Available in Brown and Black.

products.name: Wireless Earbuds
products.desc:
Crystal clear sound with deep, punchy bass.

Specifications:
• 6 hours playtime per charge
• Charging case included (18hr total)
• Sweat & water resistant (IPX4)
• Touch controls on each bud
• Bluetooth 5.0 — 10m range

products.name: Cotton Kurta
products.desc:
Soft 100% cotton kurta — perfect for all seasons.

Details:
• Sizes: S, M, L, XL, XXL
• Colors: White, Sky Blue, Olive
• Machine washable
• Breathable summer fabric
• Traditional embroidery at collar

products.name: Stainless Water Bottle
products.desc:
Double-wall vacuum insulated bottle — keeps drinks perfect all day.

Specs:
• Capacity: 750ml
• Cold: up to 24 hours
• Hot: up to 12 hours
• Leak-proof lid
• BPA-free stainless steel

products.name: Smart Watch
products.desc:
Stay connected and healthy on the go.

Features:
• Heart rate & SpO2 monitor
• Step counter & sleep tracker
• 7-day battery life
• Notification alerts (calls, SMS, apps)
• Water resistant (50m)
• Compatible with Android & iOS

products.name: Scented Candle Set
products.desc:
A luxury set of 3 hand-poured scented candles.

Scents included:
• Lavender — calming & relaxing
• Rose — romantic & warm
• Jasmine — fresh & uplifting

30+ burn hours each. Made with natural soy wax.

products.name: Ceramic Coffee Mug
products.desc:
Handmade ceramic mug with a unique earthy glaze.

Details:
• 350ml capacity
• Microwave safe
• Dishwasher safe
• Each piece is unique — no two alike
• Comfortable ergonomic handle

products.name: Desk Organizer
products.desc:
Bamboo desk organizer — keep your workspace clean and productive.

Includes:
• 5 compartments (pens, notes, cards, etc.)

• Eco-friendly bamboo material
